title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you can still do beautiful things you can do with dirty money in a dirty world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: After the summit war...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We decided that we'd, at the very least, protect with all we have the things that were important to pops.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we fought a war of repayment with any blackbeard pirate that came calling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But, having taken pops' power for himself,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We couldn't do a thing about teach. He took everything from us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we wanted was to teach that thankless upstairs a lesson!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see. So this place...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's your last memento of pops', isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. Red-hair built him a tomb nearby, you know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You know, pops was stingy as hell.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'd drink other people's drinks... he never treated us to food! Not once!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it was because he'd send every last penny of his cut here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And all of us... heh. We knew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I think of it, the shichibuki weevil,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He claims he's pops' son, right? He's going after anyone related to whitebeard at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah. Is he for real?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: can't say anything about pops and his women, but... I hear weevil's only after his "inheritance."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I doubt he'd believe us if we said it doesn't exist.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "They'll eventually come after me. After this place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. You can't leave here. Makes sense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Weevil's mother, Bakkin, is a former pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thirty years ago... no, closer to forty...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She apparently sailed with pops on the same pirate ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's probably a "members" worth protecting, too, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Now that you mention it... nah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're going to go meet straw hat Luffy now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need you to send a message for me, nekomamushi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Okay. No problem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're going to Wano, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi ol di on! Newbie! Were ye the one that worked on this here part?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, boss! Any problems?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The hell ye mean, ye Dolt?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's bloody perfect, man! I'm tryin' te praise ye, ye big bunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But I respect it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thank ye kindly,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ya old geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Friends! Witness! The edge on this blade is fearsome!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One sheet of paper into two! Into four!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eight! Sixteen! Thirty-two! Sixty- four!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The pieces fall like snow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: See! No blood! Not a drop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whoaa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if I but brush it against my skin, it cuts straight through!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KyaAah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fear not! Witness!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I apply but a dab of toad oil to this wound, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll buy your toAD OIL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll take one too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all have quite the eye! Come one, come all!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
